assessment_derived_by_this_report_not_fr.tick_size: absent from the API response entirely - not inferrable, real gap
assessment_derived_by_this_report_not_fr.spread: not computable - top_bid_price and top_ask_price are both 0.0
assessment_derived_by_this_report_not_fr.tradable_assessment_reasoning: Has a resolved security_id and trading_symbol via the instrument master (symbol_resolved_from: instrument_master in the raw response), non-zero LTP/OI/volume - this report's own judgment, not a field the API itself returns.

honest_caveat: This is bhavcopy/EOD-sourced data (data_source: nse), not a live order book snapshot - confirmed by checking all 200 contracts in the response: zero have a nonzero top_bid_price. LTP, OI, volume, and all identifying fields (security_id, trading_symbol, expiry, strike, lot_size) are real and correctly resolved via the instrument master. bid/ask/spread are genuinely unavailable from this data source, not a bug - EOD/bhavcopy snapshots do not carry live order-book depth. tick_size is not present anywhere in the /api/chain response schema (a real, separate gap, not investigated further this session).
required_fields_status: Against the 17 required fields (exchange, underlying, segment, expiry, strike, CE/PE, trading symbol, security ID, lot size, tick size, LTP, bid, ask, spread, volume/liquidity, tradable, rejection reason): 13 are present with real values or a defensible assessment (exchange and segment are inferred from exchange_segment, not literal API fields). 4 are genuinely unavailable - bid, ask, and derived spread (EOD data source has no live order-book depth, confirmed across all 200 contracts in the response) and tick_size (absent from the API response schema entirely, a separate real gap not investigated further this session).
equity_forecast_path_note: This blocker is specific to the OPTIONS trade path. It does not block the separate equity forecast/prediction path, which uses gain_rank data independently (see analyzer_signal_summary.json).
how_this_became_available: Became available after 18:30/18:45 IST (bhavcopy_download and signal_engine_bhavcopy scheduled jobs) fired for the first time today following this session's scheduler catch-up fix. At the time of the original 17:25 IST check, this data did not exist yet (see original finding below).
